name: GSAP Master MCP Server
what_it_does: GSAP Master MCP server enabling AI agents to work with GSAP (GreenSock Animation Platform) — generating GSAP animation code, providing GSAP API documentation and best practices, creating timeline-based animations, ScrollTrigger configurations, and integrating GSAP animation expertise into agent-driven web frontend development and creative coding workflows.
use_cases: Generating GSAP timeline animations from design specifications from creative coding agents
Creating ScrollTrigger-based scroll animations from frontend development agents
Providing GSAP API reference for animation properties from coding assistance agents
Building complex GSAP animation sequences from interactive design agents
Converting animation requirements to GSAP code from design-to-code agents
Optimizing GSAP performance for complex animation sequences from performance agents
not_for: CSS-only animations (GSAP adds JS overhead unnecessary for simple transitions)
Teams using Framer Motion, Three.js, or other animation libraries
best_when: A developer agent needs GSAP-specific expertise for complex web animations — GSAP's API is extensive and LLMs often generate inaccurate GSAP code without specific grounding.
avoid_when: Your team uses CSS animations, Framer Motion, or other animation libraries — this is GSAP-specific.

auth.notes: No authentication — local documentation and code generation tool. No external services required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free and open source; GSAP itself has free and paid plugin tiers
pricing.paid_tiers: None for MCP server; GSAP Club (paid) for premium plugins
pricing.notes: MCP server is free. GSAP core is free; some GSAP plugins (MorphSVG, SplitText) require Club GreenSock membership.

known_agent_gotchas: GSAP Club plugins (MorphSVG, SplitText, DrawSVG) require paid membership — specify if using
GSAP v3 vs v2 API differences are significant — ensure MCP docs cover v3 (current)
ScrollTrigger configuration has many options — complex setup benefits greatly from accurate docs
Community MCP — documentation completeness depends on what was curated
GSAP performance best practices differ from naive usage — verify generated code follows guidelines
Generated animation code must run in browser — no server-side validation possible
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local documentation tool. No external calls. No credentials. Community MCP. Safe for development use.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local tool. No external calls. No credentials. Safe community MCP.
